name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that skips the generic filler and produces polished, purposeful slides.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce bloated, template-looking decks that require heavy manual cleanup before they're usable. Chronicle 2.0 targets professionals who need AI speed without sacrificing visual quality or narrative clarity. It removes the generic 'AI slop' that makes automated presentations feel impersonal and untrustworthy.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that look hand-crafted rather than auto-generated
Creating client-facing proposals with tight, on-brand visual design
Rapidly turning research or reports into structured executive presentations
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks without a dedicated design resource
